text.title: RSpec Testing Patterns Examples
text.summary: Worked example: spec for PlaceOrderService (isolated) + Order request spec (full stack).

example.context: Rails 7 + RSpec + factory_bot; PlaceOrderService takes user + gateway + inventory + mailer; OrdersController#create delegates to it.
example.walk: Step 1: spec/services/orders/place_order_service_spec.rb requires spec_helper; spec/requests/api/v1/orders_spec.rb requires rails_helper. Step 2: service spec — describe PlaceOrderService, context 'when inventory sufficient', context 'when inventory insufficient', context 'when payment declined'. Step 3: service spec uses build_stubbed for user/order; request spec uses create. Step 4: shared_examples_for 'auditable' includes created_by + updated_by checks; applied to Order, Customer, Refund specs. Step 5: --profile 10 shows request specs dominate; service spec is 80ms.
example.output: Service spec 80ms; request spec 1.2s; suite total 90s instead of 8min after build_stubbed audit.
